
curl -k -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -X POST "[https://10.120.220.206:10443/auth/realms/oam/protocol/openid-connect/token"](https://10.120.220.206:10443/auth/realms/oam/protocol/openid-connect/token%22) --data-urlencode "client\_id=provisioning-client" --data-urlencode "client\_secret=provisioning-client-secret" --data-urlencode "scope=scopes.ericsson.com/activation/mapi.read scopes.ericsson.com/activation/mapi.write openid" --data-urlencode "grant\_type=client\_credentials" -vvv -k|jq

**jq可以让结果以json文件显示**

curl -k -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCIgOiAiSldUIiwia2lkIiA6ICI3UHp5WWgwcXMxeTdwbm9TblNWaW5OX2FxWDc4OFFvS01VaEVadTJ4alE0In0..DqiLexw5MxEtz0-jsq4iRrv2LQoXOSWJHoeNhenTXIdCU786Ng0\_ComgVdDkmkyDiByptppY327fJH6DAAIAOCKTfRR9MUsQ3kag-QJRswWEFMg2zFFYG1TIAfZACJEQ-ZdX27ib8tMypq4wK9gTjl-pM32cGdcUllAAoNLQA-CGfug50\_3Jw0axQkPjKfQ5cLjaYIBiepT0TVybQyEvNsTTR66XH9tE-e8puaA1giSnBOxLyxscv5Z1YKX2vzzdiL7fXC38D7dkihRIumaR791dkGvpfuofq25NwdUOiwpO6iUGoe1obBmfGu79\_HoeoGvQA8RpxqnyeSF0v5zdRA" -X GET "[http://10.120.220.206:1080/mapi/v1/users/imsi-123456789012345/udm/udmSubscription"](http://10.120.220.206:1080/mapi/v1/users/imsi-123456789012345/udm/udmSubscription%22)
